chapter_title.en: Chapter 57 – The protection and the seeking Refuge

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: سكت عنه - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/436)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: سكت عنه - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/436)
text: أَعُوذُ بِعِزَّةِ اللَّهِ وَ أَعُوذُ بِقُدْرَةِ اللَّهِ وَ أَعُوذُ بِجَلَالِ اللَّهِ وَ أَعُوذُ بِعَظَمَةِ اللَّهِ وَ أَعُوذُ بِعَفْوِ اللَّهِ وَ أَعُوذُ بِمَغْفِرَةِ اللَّهِ وَ أَعُوذُ بِرَحْمَةِ اللَّهِ وَ أَعُوذُ بِسُلْطَانِ اللَّهِ الَّذِي هُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْ‏ءٍ قَدِيرٌ وَ أَعُوذُ بِكَرَمِ اللَّهِ وَ أَعُوذُ بِجَمْعِ اللَّهِ مِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ جَبَّارٍ عَنِيدٍ وَ كُلِّ شَيْطَانٍ مَرِيدٍ وَ شَرِّ كُلِّ قَرِيبٍ أَوْ بَعِيدٍ أَوْ ضَعِيفٍ أَوْ شَدِيدٍ وَ مِنْ شَرِّ السَّامَّةِ وَ الْهَامَّةِ وَ الْعَامَّةِ وَ مِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ دَابَّةٍ صَغِيرَةٍ أَوْ كَبِيرَةٍ بِلَيْلٍ أَوْ نَهَارٍ وَ مِنْ شَرِّ فُسَّاقِ الْعَرَبِ وَ الْعَجَمِ وَ مِنْ شَرِّ فَسَقَةِ الْجِنِّ وَ الْإِنْسِ

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Muhassin Bin Ahmad, from Yunus Bin Yaqoub, from Abu Baseer,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Say

‘I seek Refuge with the Might of Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, and I seek Refuge by the Power of Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, and I seek Refuge by the majesty of Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, and I seek Refuge with the Magnificence of Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, and I seek Refuge with the Pardon of Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, and I seek Refuge with the Forgiveness of Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, and I seek Refuge with the Mercy of Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, and I seek Refuge with the Authority of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> by which He<sup>azwj </sup>is Able over everything, and I seek Refuge with the Benevolence of Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, and I seek Refuge with the Hold of Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, from the evil of every tenacious tyrant and every rebellious Satan<sup>la</sup> and the evil of everything nearby, or remote, or weak, or difficult, and from the evil of the venomous (reptiles) and the insects, and the critical and the general, and from the evil of every animal be it small or large, at night or day, and from the evil of every mischievous Arab and the non-Arab, and from the evil of the mischief of the Jinn and the human beings’’.
en.sarwar: 2. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from Muhsin ibn Ahmad from Yunus ibn Ya’qub from abu Basir from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “For protection say, ‘I seek protection with the majesty of Allah, I seek protection with the power of Allah, I seek protection with glory of Allah, I seek protection with the greatness of Allah, I seek protection with the pardoning of Allah, I seek protection with the forgiveness of Allah, I seek protection with the mercy of Allah, I seek protection with the authority of Allah, Who has power over all things, I seek protection with the generosity of Allah, I seek protection with the community of Allah against the evil of all tyrants and hatemongers and all the condemned devils, all near and far, weak and strong, all poisonous beasts, fear, plague, the evil of all small and large animals, during the night or day, the evil of sinful Arabs and non-Arabs and the evil of the sinful Jinn and man.’”
